title: Allocation-conscious HUDPaint hook
prompt:
Write a client-side HUDPaint hook that draws a fixed material, color, and the local player's health. HUDPaint runs every frame, so keep it cheap on that hot path: avoid rebuilding constant resources on each frame, avoid repeating identical lookups within a single frame, and bail out safely when the player isn't usable.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: stable Material/Color outside HUDPaint and one per-frame LocalPlayer/value lookup
